creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
It's not clear if devel/dbus is at fault here.  It seems like a
consolekit issue, but we have consolekit2-1.2.1 now.  I don't see
any messages of that kind here, so I suspect some kind of
misconfiguration of the system or maybe the problem has gone away
at some point.

The bug hasn't been updated since 2016, so I'm closing this.
